# PawDesk

> PawDesk is a mobile CRM built specifically for independent pet groomers, dog walkers, cat groomers, and mobile grooming van operators. It replaces spreadsheets and paper diaries with a single, phone-first app.

## What PawDesk Does

PawDesk gives solo pet care professionals everything they need to run a professional business without hiring an office manager.

## Core Features

- **Scheduling calendar** — book, view, and manage appointments from your phone; week-at-a-glance view; drag-to-reschedule
- **Digital invoicing** — one-tap PDF invoice generation; accept card payments; track paid and outstanding balances
- **Client & pet profiles** — store pet photos, breed, weight, coat type, allergies, preferred shampoo, and vet contact per animal
- **Appointment reminders** — automated email reminders sent 24 hours before each appointment; reduces no-shows
- **Payment history** — full ledger per client; see lifetime value, last payment date, and outstanding balance at a glance
- **Voice notes per visit** — dictate post-appointment notes hands-free; auto-transcribed and saved to the pet's record
- **Dashboard** — today's schedule, outstanding invoices, and recent activity in one screen

## Target Audience

- Freelance / independent dog groomers
- Mobile grooming van operators
- Home-based grooming salon owners
- Dog walkers who also offer grooming
- Cat groomers
- Pet sitters who offer grooming add-ons

## Pricing

- **Free (Beta)** — full access during beta, all features included, early-adopter rate locked in
- **Pro** — $19/month when paid plans launch
- **Business** — $49/month for multi-staff / higher volume

## Company

PawDesk is built in Canada for the North American pet care market. The app works on any smartphone — no download required during beta.
